violations.text: Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination (raw shelled eggs over raw fish). Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The doors to the outside, located in the rear, side and main entrance are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Gaskets for prep unit lowboy were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2025

Gated enclosure for refuse was observed with an accumulation of trash, food debris and sand. Area to be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Rags were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The door to the outside, located in the rear, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Per PIC whole door is to be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2025
Gaskets for prep unit lowboy were observed held by tape. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2025
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary products. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2025
Walk-in coolers fanguards were observed with an accumulation of dust. Physical facilities to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2025
